creator: vsasjason@gmail.com
text:
root@cs0:~# poudriere distclean
[00:00:00] ====>> Gathering all expected distfiles for ports tree 'default'
[00:02:07] ====>> Warning: (www/tclhttpd): make[1]: "/usr/share/mk/" line 1: Need an operator
[00:02:07] ====>> Warning: (www/tclhttpd): make[1]: Fatal errors encountered -- cannot continuemake: "/usr/ports/www/tclhttpd/Makefile" line 22: warning: "make -f "/usr/ports/www/tclhttpd/files/Makefile.lib" -V SHLIB_NAME" returned non-zero status
[00:02:16] ====>> Gathering list of actual distfiles
[00:02:16] ====>> No stale distfiles to cleanup
root@cs0:~# poudriere ports -l
PORTSTREE METHOD TIMESTAMP PATH
default   -                /usr/ports
